auth.label: Master API Key
auth.description: Keen Master API Key sent with the Authorization header. Find it in your Keen project settings: https://keen.io/projects/.

extraFields.label: Project ID
extraFields.description: Keen project ID used in each API path. Find it in the same Keen project settings page: https://keen.io/projects/.

actions.name: add_event
actions.description: Publish one JSON event to a Keen event collection.

eventCollection.description: The Keen event collection that receives the event.

event.description: The JSON event object published to Keen.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for publishing one Keen event.

raw.description: The raw Keen event publishing response object.

actions.name: query_count
actions.description: Count Keen events that match a required timeframe and optional filters.

eventCollection.description: The Keen event collection to analyze.

anyOf.description: A Keen relative timeframe such as this_7_days.

start.description: The inclusive ISO-8601 timestamp for the analysis timeframe.

end.description: The exclusive ISO-8601 timestamp for the analysis timeframe.

timeframe.description: The required analysis timeframe accepted by Keen.

propertyName.description: The event property name to filter.

operator.description: The Keen filter operator, such as eq or in.

propertyValue.description: The value compared against the event property.

filters.description: The optional event-property filters applied by Keen.

anyOf.description: One event property used to group Keen results.

items.description: One event property used to group Keen results.

anyOf.description: The event properties used to group Keen results.

groupBy.description: One or more event properties used to group Keen results.

interval.description: The interval used to group Keen results over time.

timezone.description: The timezone assigned to relative Keen timeframes.

includeMetadata.description: Whether Keen should include execution metadata in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Keen count analysis.

result.description: The analysis result returned by Keen.

raw.description: The raw Keen analysis response object.

outputSchema.description: A Keen analysis response with a dynamic result value.

actions.name: query_sum
actions.description: Sum a numeric property across Keen events in a required timeframe.

eventCollection.description: The Keen event collection to analyze.

anyOf.description: A Keen relative timeframe such as this_7_days.

start.description: The inclusive ISO-8601 timestamp for the analysis timeframe.

end.description: The exclusive ISO-8601 timestamp for the analysis timeframe.

timeframe.description: The required analysis timeframe accepted by Keen.

propertyName.description: The event property name to filter.

operator.description: The Keen filter operator, such as eq or in.

propertyValue.description: The value compared against the event property.

filters.description: The optional event-property filters applied by Keen.

anyOf.description: One event property used to group Keen results.

items.description: One event property used to group Keen results.

anyOf.description: The event properties used to group Keen results.

groupBy.description: One or more event properties used to group Keen results.

interval.description: The interval used to group Keen results over time.

timezone.description: The timezone assigned to relative Keen timeframes.

includeMetadata.description: Whether Keen should include execution metadata in the response.

targetProperty.description: The numeric event property that Keen sums.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Keen sum analysis.

result.description: The analysis result returned by Keen.

raw.description: The raw Keen analysis response object.

outputSchema.description: A Keen analysis response with a dynamic result value.
